"Architect enterprise-scale multimodal AI systems. I ship 60+ production APIs processing 10M+ records daily at 99.9% uptime. Specialized in LLM optimization, RAG pipelines, model quantization, and infrastructure for measurable business impact."
Who I Am

Engineer. Researcher.
AI Architect.

I am a high-impact AI Engineer with 2+ years of proven experience leading the architecture, optimization, and cloud-native deployment of production-grade Generative AI, LLM, and Multimodal AI systems across enterprise environments.

At Digital AIML, I own the complete AI product lifecycle — from strategic model selection and LLM fine-tuning to RAG pipeline design, MLOps governance, and enterprise-scale delivery. My systems sustain 99.9% uptime processing 10M+ records with a 40% inference latency reduction.

My expertise spans the full intersection of vision, language, and speech intelligence — deploying unified multimodal platforms that drive real enterprise outcomes. I bring deep technical precision alongside the strategic thinking to translate complex AI capabilities into measurable business value.

Holding a B.E. in Computer Science (CGPA 8.87) from Savitribai Phule Pune University, I am also a published researcher in Deep Learning.

Published: "Login Face Authentication Using Deep Learning" — Deep Learning research on facial biometric authentication systems

My Approach

Design Philosophy &
Architecture Thinking

⚡
Reliability First
Mission-critical AI systems demand 99.9% uptime guarantees. Every architecture decision prioritizes fault tolerance, graceful degradation, and observability at scale.
✓ 60+ APIs · 99.9% uptime · 10M+ records/day
🚀
Latency Obsession
Every millisecond counts. Through quantization, caching, inference optimization, and edge compute strategies, I've achieved 40% latency reduction on production LLM deployments.
✓ 40% latency reduction · Sub-500ms inference
📊
Data-Driven Decisions
No guesswork. Every system design is validated through rigorous A/B testing, performance benchmarking, and feedback loops. Metrics drive iteration and continuous improvement.
✓ ML Observability · Real-time dashboards
🔧
Production Hardening
Systems must survive production chaos. Canary deployments, automated rollback, container orchestration, comprehensive monitoring, and disaster recovery are non-negotiable fundamentals.
✓ Docker · Kubernetes · SageMaker
Career Timeline

Professional
Experience

AI Engineer
Digital AIML · Pune
Sep 2024 — Present
  • Spearheaded end-to-end architecture and delivery of a next-generation Multimodal AI Platform integrating vision, language, speech, and document intelligence — enabling real-time enterprise AI inference at scale and driving measurable business outcomes across verticals.
  • Owned the complete LLM lifecycle: strategically selected, fine-tuned & productionized Llama 3, Qwen, BERT, T5, Bark — applying quantization, pruning & knowledge distillation to achieve 40% reduction in inference latency while significantly lowering cloud compute expenditure.
  • Architected and shipped 60+ high-availability REST APIs & WebSocket services handling real-time AI inference across text, audio, video, PDF & HTML — sustaining 99.9% system uptime at 10M+ record throughput scale.
  • Championed enterprise-grade RAG pipeline implementation leveraging Pinecone, FAISS, ChromaDB & Weaviate — delivering sub-second semantic search and knowledge retrieval for large-scale enterprise clients.
  • Institutionalized MLOps best practices organization-wide: CI/CD, model versioning, A/B testing on AWS SageMaker, Azure ML & GCP Vertex AI — ensuring governance, reproducibility & scalable model lifecycle management.
  • Led integration of AI-powered ASR, TTS, intelligent resume parsing & AI interview monitoring — expanding product capability surface and directly accelerating client acquisition.

TOP Analytica · Amravati, MH
Jul 2024 — Aug 2025
  • Spearheaded end-to-end data science strategy for large-scale Maharashtra political campaigns — owned the full analytics pipeline from raw data ingestion to executive-level decision intelligence across 50+ constituencies.
  • Engineered fully automated Python ETL pipelines processing millions of voter records daily — eliminated 95% of manual data errors, saved 15+ hours/month, and enabled real-time campaign intelligence at unprecedented operational scale.
  • Applied advanced statistical testing (hypothesis testing, A/B analysis) across 10M+ voter survey records — surfaced critical demographic trends and informed hyper-targeted campaign strategy with data-backed precision.
  • Architected real-time Power BI dashboards for senior campaign leadership — reduced strategic decision turnaround time by 30% and directly influenced high-stakes campaign outcomes.
  • Conducted deep EDA and behavioral segmentation modeling to profile voter personas across geographic clusters — enabling precision-targeted outreach across diverse Maharashtra constituencies.
  • Served as primary liaison between data science and campaign strategy teams — translating complex analytical outputs into clear, executive-ready insights for senior political stakeholders.
